title: The Problem
subtitle: Information Overload & Disconnected Tools
key_talking_points: Students and researchers face an ever-growing mountain of unstructured documents.
Traditional search relies on rigid keywords, missing context and semantic meaning.
Study tools are fragmented: reading, note-taking, and querying happen in different apps.
visual_concept: A 3D chaotic cloud of floating documents and disconnected nodes representing a fragmented workflow.
animation_concept: GSAP slow rotation of the 3D cloud. Text elements stagger in. On scroll out, the cloud collapses into a neat stack.

title: The Vision
subtitle: A Unified, Intelligent Study Assistant
key_talking_points: Merge active reading with semantic AI retrieval.
Enable instant answers strictly grounded in the user's uploaded materials.
Provide a premium, distraction-free environment that empowers deep focus.
visual_concept: The chaotic document stack transforms into a glowing, interconnected neural network that pulses with energy.
animation_concept: Morphing Three.js particles from documents into a clean graph. Smooth text reveal using GSAP SplitText.

title: Project Overview
subtitle: Meet UniAct RAG App
key_talking_points: A complete, full-stack Retrieval-Augmented Generation application.
Features a dedicated Study Area, AI Chat, Exam Generation, and Document Summarization.
Built for high performance, scale, and real-time interaction.
visual_concept: A high-level dashboard preview rendered using a 3D glassmorphism card floating in space.
animation_concept: Parallax floating effect. Background features subtle data streams. Text slides in from the left.

title: User Journey
subtitle: Frictionless Onboarding to Insight
key_talking_points: Step 1: Upload complex PDFs effortlessly.
Step 2: The system instantly chunks, embeds, and indexes the text.
Step 3: Users interact via chat, generate exams, or build mind maps.
Step 4: Users review original files in the isolated Study Area.
visual_concept: A horizontal interactive timeline showing the 4 steps, with an active glowing line tracing the progress.
animation_concept: GSAP ScrollTrigger scrubbing the progress line and scaling up each step node as it enters the viewport.

title: Core Workflow
subtitle: Interaction at the Speed of Thought
key_talking_points: Real-time feedback during uploads.
Streaming responses during AI chat to eliminate waiting.
Immediate synchronization between the Study Area and the cloud.
visual_concept: A split-screen layout. Left: The live Chat interface Replica. Right: Animated message flow.
animation_concept: Typing animation for the user query, followed by simulated streaming of the AI response.

title: System Architecture
subtitle: The Big Picture
key_talking_points: Client: Vite + React Frontend.
Gateway & Compute: Modal Serverless Infrastructure running FastAPI.
Storage: PostgreSQL for relational state and Qdrant for high-dimensional vectors.
visual_concept: A complex 3D isometric diagram of the 4 main blocks (Frontend, Backend, Postgres, Qdrant) with animated data pulses traveling between them.
animation_concept: Three.js camera orbits around the architecture. GSAP highlights each block sequentially.

title: Frontend Architecture
subtitle: Component-Driven & Reactive
key_talking_points: Built with React 19 and Vite for lightning-fast HMR and optimized builds.
Centralized state using React Context API (`AppContext`).
Strict separation of UI components and API logic (`api.js`).
Lucide-react for consistent iconography.
visual_concept: An interactive, animated component tree resembling a file explorer or fractal tree.
animation_concept: Nodes expand outwards. The Context API node pulses, sending waves down to consumer components.

title: Backend Architecture
subtitle: Modular, Async, Scalable
key_talking_points: FastAPI framework providing async I/O and automatic OpenAPI docs.
Modular routing design: `base`, `data`, `nlp`, `session`, and `study` routers.
Clean separation of concerns: Models, Controllers, and Routes.
visual_concept: A 3D representation of the FastAPI routers as distinct modules converging into the `main.py` entrypoint.
animation_concept: The modules fly in from the background and lock into a central core. GSAP staggers their appearance.

title: Database Design
subtitle: Dual-Engine Persistence
key_talking_points: PostgreSQL manages relational data: Projects, Sessions, and User States via SQLAlchemy and Alembic.
Qdrant manages vector embeddings for semantic search and retrieval.
Both are connected asynchronously (`asyncpg`) for high throughput.
visual_concept: Two contrasting 3D structures: A rigid, structured grid (PostgreSQL) and a free-floating constellation of points (Qdrant).
animation_concept: Data objects flow into the grid, while text chunks transform into points of light flowing into the constellation.

title: AI / RAG Pipeline
subtitle: Retrieval-Augmented Generation Architecture
key_talking_points: The RAG Pipeline connects embedding logic to LLM generation.
Utilizes LangChain community loaders for document structuring.
Cohere and OpenAI power the underlying intelligence for summaries and exams.
visual_concept: A high-level pipeline diagram highlighting LangChain, Cohere, and OpenAI integrations.
animation_concept: Pipeline stages light up sequentially. Integration logos fade in when mentioned.

title: Retrieval Lifecycle
subtitle: Query to Answer Execution Flow
key_talking_points: User Query → Embedding Generation.
Vector Search → Qdrant retrieves top-k chunks.
Reranking & Context Assembly → Structuring the prompt.
LLM Generation → Streaming the final response back to the user.
visual_concept: Animated Code Walkthrough. Shows the Python logic splitting the text, embedding it, and prompting the LLM.
animation_concept: Code syntax highlights line-by-line as a 3D diagram perfectly mirrors the code execution.

title: Document Processing Pipeline
subtitle: From PDF to Semantic Chunks
key_talking_points: LangChain PyMuPDFLoader extracts raw text from complex PDFs.
RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter chunks text while preserving sentence boundaries and paragraphs.
Metadata is deeply tracked (file IDs, chapters) for precise filtering later.
visual_concept: A document moves through a laser scanner, splitting into smaller geometric blocks, each receiving a glowing metadata tag.
animation_concept: Three.js mesh splitting animation combined with GSAP text overlays displaying chunk counts.

title: API Layer
subtitle: REST Meets Real-Time Streaming
key_talking_points: Standard REST endpoints for CRUD operations (uploading, fetching history).
Server-Sent Events (SSE) via `StreamingResponse` for typing-effect chat output and live summarization.
Global CORS configuration enabling seamless decoupled frontend interaction.
visual_concept: A network topology map showing steady REST requests vs rapid, continuous stream packets for SSE.
animation_concept: GSAP timeline contrasting the timing of a single block payload vs a continuous stream of particles.

title: Infrastructure & Deployment
subtitle: Powered by Modal Serverless Compute
key_talking_points: Entire backend packaged and deployed automatically to Modal via `modal_deploy.py`.
Docker-less configuration: dependencies specified directly in Python code.
Auto-scaling from 0 to N containers instantly based on web traffic.
visual_concept: A massive data center that scales out (copies itself) dynamically as simulated traffic hits it.
animation_concept: Three.js instance mesh scaling animation driven by ScrollTrigger progress.

title: Key Technical Decisions
subtitle: Architecting for the Future
key_talking_points: Why FastAPI over Django? Unmatched async performance for AI streaming.
Why Modal over AWS Lambda? Native support for heavy AI workloads and instant cold-starts.
Why React + Vite? Fast iteration loops and robust ecosystem for complex state.
visual_concept: A minimalist, elegant grid layout featuring comparison cards. Premium typography.
animation_concept: Cards tilt toward the mouse using a 3D hover effect. Sequential fade-up on scroll.

title: Engineering Challenges
subtitle: Overcoming Distributed Complexity
key_talking_points: File Sync Challenge: Ephemeral container instances causing 'File Not Found' errors, solved via Modal NetworkFileSystem.
RAG Retrieval Challenge: Preventing context dilution by implementing strict `file_chapter_filters` metadata routing.
PDF Processing Challenge: Extracting structured content efficiently handled by PyMuPDF.
State Management: Keeping the isolated Study Area decoupled from RAG global state.
visual_concept: Code Walkthrough. Shows the transition from `modal.Volume` to `modal.NetworkFileSystem` in `modal_deploy.py`, alongside metadata filtering in `nlp.py`.
animation_concept: GSAP diff viewer highlighting the exact line changes that fixed the production bugs.

title: Security Considerations
subtitle: Safe, Isolated, and Robust
key_talking_points: Project ID Isolation: Every vector search and DB query is strictly scoped to a unique `project_id`.
CORS controls and environment variables for secrets (`.env`).
Stateless session management ensuring no cross-contamination of chat histories.
visual_concept: A glowing shield protecting the data cores. Visual representation of Project ID boundaries.
animation_concept: Particles attempt to cross boundaries but are repelled, demonstrating isolation.

title: Performance Optimizations
subtitle: Engineered for Speed
key_talking_points: Streaming LLM generation reduces perceived latency to milliseconds.
Asynchronous database clients (`asyncpg`, `aiofiles`) prevent blocking the event loop.
React `useMemo` and selective state updates prevent unnecessary frontend re-renders.
visual_concept: Speedometer and latency graphs racing to zero.
animation_concept: GSAP animated charts filling up. Code snippets highlighting `async` and `await` keywords.

title: Project Metrics Dashboard
subtitle: Dynamically Generated Codebase Analytics
key_talking_points: Lines of Code, Component Counts, API Endpoints, and Database Models.
Metrics are not hardcoded; they are generated by a real-time scanner iterating over the file system.
Provides a true representation of the project's complexity and scale.
visual_concept: Massive, bold typography counters counting up to their target values inside glassmorphism panels.
animation_concept: GSAP counter animation reading from the dynamically generated metrics object on scroll.

title: Future Vision
subtitle: Where We Are Going
key_talking_points: Multi-modal RAG: Processing images and charts within PDFs.
Real-time Collaborative Study Sessions (WebSockets).
Advanced Knowledge Graph generation.
visual_concept: A futuristic horizon line with nodes connecting out into infinity.
animation_concept: Continuous slow forward movement through a 3D tunnel of nodes.

title: Live Product Demo
subtitle: Experience the Product
key_talking_points: Interact with the fully functional Study Area.
See the isolated persistence and AI querying in action.
visual_concept: The ACTUAL application UI embedded cleanly inside the presentation frame, fully interactive.
animation_concept: The presentation wrapper fades out slightly to give full focus to the embedded application component.
